programme.desc: The Caribbean island of Nevis is very close to Steven and Murila Fifer's hearts. Murila was born there, and the couple have visited the place together many times over the years. They have now decided their dream holiday home should be on the island, so Scarlette Douglas shows them five properties within their £330,000 budget. Will they fall for a country villa or a beach-side home?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle hunt for bargains in Scarborough, with finds including a pair of Charles Barlow vases, before heading to auction in Beverley, East Yorkshire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Hull is the starting point for Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle as they search the north east of England, picking up a rare 18th-century puzzle jug and some Shelley porcelain

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: At Witley Recycling Centre, upcycler Sarah Moore is on the lookout for three unloved items she can save from the skip, salvage and sell on for a profit. To help transform her trio of tip-finds Sarah turns to furniture re-styler Emma Walker to help overhaul a pair of seats, while upholsterer Anthony Devine is challenged with bringing an Edwardian armchair into the 21st Century. For her own project, Sarah takes on an old typewriter

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard heads to the Malvern Hills, where he unearths one of his most unusual finds. Plus, he visits a famed stone mason's in Liverpool to examine rare artisan carvings

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Investigators respond to reports of an injured dog and are shocked to find that its paw is almost severed

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Liz Pavlicek visits a house where more than 30 spaniels have been neglected, and is shocked by their appalling conditions

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The critical care team fights to save the life of a badly injured biker after a head-on collision with a car in the Yorkshire Dales. A shepherd calls for help after a fall

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: The Yorkshire Air Ambulance medics rush to the scene where a man has been crushed by his milk truck. The crew also help a biker who crashed at speed on the motorway

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades is at Walsall recycling centre on a mission to save three unwanted items, coming away with a pair of dining chairs, a well-used table and some discarded DJ equipment

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle hunt for bargains in Scarborough, with finds including a pair of Charles Barlow vases, before heading to auction in Beverley, East Yorkshire

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew Pritchard visits some family-run businesses in Lincolnshire and Norfolk in the hope of finding rare and unusual antiques that have never been put on sale before

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: PC Gayles and his dog Thor are on the hunt for evidence to convict mobile phone thieves. In Glasgow, sniffer dog Eddie carries out his first search for a gun

programme.title: Haunted Hospitals
programme.desc: In Northern England, a nurse experiences unexplainable freezing temperatures in heated rooms, before seeing an apparition of a policeman walking around the hospital at night

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: The team returns to Las Vegas to investigate the Riviera Hotel and Casino, which is scheduled to be demolished, and four fans are invited to join the spook stake-out

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The first of three programmes in which Yvette Fielding and a team of investigators head to Standon Hall, Staffordshire, the most fearful place they have yet visited

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Wine critics Oz Clarke and Jilly Goolden embark on the cross-country treasure-hunting challenge, travelling around Angus and Perthshire before heading to auction in Edinburgh. They are aided by experts Margie Cooper and James Braxton

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a property in Durham, a flat in Fulham, south-west London, and a cottage in Cornwall. They then follow the sales at auction and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings, returning after a few months to review their progress

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ex-RAF officers Simon Stenning and Amanda Butcher have been visiting the Caribbean island of Antigua for several years, and now hope to find the perfect winter home there. Ben Hillman helps the pair, showing them five properties for their £330,000 budget

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle set off on the final road trip leg from the Derbyshire town of Matlock. Militaria mad Paul hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head earns him a huge profit. Claire buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Paul also unravels the story behind the world-famous crooked church tower at Chesterfield and Claire meets a relative of the first man to circumnavigate Australia, who hails from the Lincolnshire town of Donnington. The pressure is on at the final auction in Stamford, Lincolnshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Philip Serrell and Christina Trevanion set off on a trip around Britain seeking out bargains they hope will make a profit at auction. They begin their journey at Castle Douglas in Dumfries and Galloway, before heading south to their first auction in Newcastle upon Tyne

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Jay Blades is at Walsall recycling centre on a mission to save three unwanted items, coming away with a pair of dining chairs, a well-used table and some discarded DJ equipment

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Salvager Drew Pritchard explores a Napoleonic fort in Essex, and tours the medieval Lichfield Cathedral, where he checks out some unwanted objects

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: The SPCA tries to save a dog that is found hanging by its neck in a yard, and investigators rush to reunite some puppies with their mother

programme.title: Animal Cops Miami
programme.desc: Officers are called to rescue a black bear that has been hit by a car, while investigators confront the owner of an illegal pig-slaughtering operation

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: A biker comes off his vehicle in the Dales and paramedics Daz and Pete must act quickly to restore blood-flow to his foot - if they fail, he could lose his leg

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A 61-year-old man is treated after an accident involving a chainsaw. And, doctors must act quickly to save a patient whose heart is racing out of control.

programme.title: Money for Nothing

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a worrying horned-shaped growth. Elsewhere, Dr Lee treats Kevin, who has a huge lump protruding from his hip

programme.title: Deadly Possessions
programme.desc: Zak Bagans, host of Ghost Adventures, fulfils a lifelong dream of opening a museum in downtown Las Vegas, full of the haunted and cursed objects he has been collecting through the years. Then, he consults a Las Vegas rabbi after examining a deadly wine cabinet with a connection to the Holocaust

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: First episode of the fantasy drama charting the legendary wizard's formative years, starring Colin Morgan and Anthony Head. Merlin is sent by his mother to start a new life in Camelot, where he witnesses the execution of a man for using magic and learns he must tread carefully from now on. When he later steps in to protect a manservant from Prince Arthur and encounters the Great Dragon, the young sorcerer begins an adventure that will determine his destiny

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Melinda is contacted by the spirit of a woman whose death caused an estrangement between her husband and son, and begs the medium can reconcile the pair so that she can cross over. Supernatural drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Jenkins discovers something strange has happened to the Library since it returned from the Void, and his findings draw the team back together, just in time to solve the mystery of a massive storm lingering over Manhattan. programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a neighbour begins acting oddly and boards up the windows of his house, Melinda realises he is being pursued by a vengeful ghost, and resolves to intervene. Starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: The Librarians

programme.title: Fred Dinenage: Murder Casebook
programme.desc: The presenter explores the crimes of Graham Frederick Young who, after serving 15 years for poisoning his parents, laced an entire factory's tea with deadly thallium

programme.title: Air Ambulance ER
programme.desc: Documentary following Britain's emergency helicopter medical services. Timing is everything, too, when the crew turn their attention to a four-year-old girl with a serious leg fracture

programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Professional help is on hand for house-hunters Nick and Jill Felsing, who want to buy a luxury home in northern Tenerife for around £250,000. Amanda Lamb shows them a nine-bedroom cliff-side palace with a pool and a villa in a banana plantation

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb presents highlights of the foreign property series, focusing on the best homes found in Spain and the Canary Islands

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The passengers reach Orvieto in Umbria, where they learn how to make traditional pizza and taste local wine. New arrivals also make a memorable first impression on the coach

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists arrive in Rome and embark on a busy day of sightseeing, although some of the trippers grow tired of what they regard as Sally's constant attention-seeking

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The tourists reach Florence, but their appreciation of the Renaissance splendour is disrupted as Pasquale has difficulties with the laundry and Brendan is embarrassed by his travelling companions during a lesson at an art school. Returning to the coach, the passengers are shocked to learn they face a special vote

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: Morale hits a new low following the previous day's poll as the coach arrives in Pisa. The tourists take snaps of the famous leaning tower and visit a cheese factory in Parma before decision time causes tempers to flare once again

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English

programme.title: Seven Thunders (1957)
programme.desc: Two British soldiers escape from German prison camps and hide out in a fishing village in occupied France. As they wait for the opportunity to return to England, they attract the attention of a doctor who is also a serial killer preying on fugitives from the Nazis. Second World War drama based on Rupert Croft-Cooke's novel, starring Stephen Boyd and James Robertson Justice

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Richmond and Bellingham for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps Deborah Robertson find a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Tobago, checking out a £149,000 hillside retreat and a traditional dwelling

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Amanda Lamb helps a British couple seeking a permanent home in Orlando, Florida, for less than £100,000. She shows them a selection of properties including a lakeside house and a typical local villa

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Homeowners work to increase the value of their properties, redesigning and refurbishing for maximum profits

programme.title: The Coronation of Queen Elizabeth II
programme.desc: Documentary charting the historic events of June 2, 1953, when the Queen became the 39th sovereign to be crowned at Westminster Abbey. What happened behind the scenes is explored through diaries, letters and government papers, as well as rare film footage and photographs, and there are also interviews with historians and experts on royal ceremonies. The programme reveals that Her Majesty's apparent calmness during the Coronation contrasted with organisers' last-minute nerves as the BBC mounted its most ambitious television broadcast to date, amid the concerns of prime minister Winston Churchill

programme.title: Royal Cousins at War
programme.desc: Part two of two. The documentary examines the key role played by royalty in smoothing the path to the Anglo-Russian entente of 1907, and the part played by the Kaiser's erratic, unstable personality in the growing isolation of Germany in the years leading up to 1914. The film also explores the roles played by the German, British and Russian monarchs in the months leading up to the outbreak of the First World War and tells the story of George V's refusal to grant his cousin Nicholas II asylum in England following the Russian Revolution of 1917

programme.title: Ladies That Punch
programme.desc: Documentary about the Ladies Boxing Association, whose members come from all walks of life, from catwalk models to IT workers

programme.title: UCMMA
programme.desc: Some of the UK's finest Mixed Martial Arts fighters tear it up in the cage with intense action from East London's iconic venue, The Troxy

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Military drama following life for a group of SAS recruits, starring Ross Kemp

programme.title: The Returned (2013)
programme.desc: A young doctor goes on the run with her bitten boyfriend and their remaining supplies of a protein used to treat a zombie virus. Sci-fi horror, starring Emily Hampshire, Kris Holden-Ried and Shawn Doyle

programme.title: True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to Mary Millington, Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970s

programme.title: The Coronation of Queen Elizabeth II
programme.desc: Documentary charting the historic events of June 2, 1953, when the Queen became the 39th sovereign to be crowned at Westminster Abbey. What happened behind the scenes is explored through diaries, letters and government papers, as well as rare film footage and photographs, and there are also interviews with historians and experts on royal ceremonies. The programme reveals that Her Majesty's apparent calmness during the Coronation contrasted with organisers' last-minute nerves as the BBC mounted its most ambitious television broadcast to date, amid the concerns of prime minister Winston Churchill

programme.title: Royal Cousins at War
programme.desc: Part two of two. The documentary examines the key role played by royalty in smoothing the path to the Anglo-Russian entente of 1907, and the part played by the Kaiser's erratic, unstable personality in the growing isolation of Germany in the years leading up to 1914. The film also explores the roles played by the German, British and Russian monarchs in the months leading up to the outbreak of the First World War and tells the story of George V's refusal to grant his cousin Nicholas II asylum in England following the Russian Revolution of 1917

programme.title: Royal Cousins at War
programme.desc: Part two of two. The film also explores the roles played by the German, British and Russian monarchs in the months leading up to the outbreak of the First World War and tells the story of George V's refusal to grant his cousin Nicholas II asylum in England following the Russian Revolution of 1917

programme.title: Eat to Live Forever with Giles Coren
programme.desc: The food critic takes up three extreme regimens in an effort to push the limits of life expectancy and meets people from around the world whose pursuit of longevity is an obsession that dominates every aspect of their lives. He undertakes the calorie restriction diet, before going on one that consists only of foods hunted, fished or gathered by mankind's Paleolithic ancestors and ends with another made up almost entirely of fruit. Throughout the process, Giles's health is monitored by his doctor, who assesses the impact these dietary habits are having on his body

programme.title: When You're Strange (2009)
programme.desc: Documentary examining the history of 1960s rock band the Doors, from their formation in 1965 to the death of lead singer Jim Morrison just six years later. Featuring previously unseen rehearsal and concert footage, including the remains of an unfinished underground film starring Morrison. Narrated by Johnny Depp

programme.title: Dead Ringers (1988)
programme.desc: Identical twin gynaecologists Elliot and Beverly share everything in their life. Elliot, self-assured and experienced, passes his unwitting sexual conquests to shy and sensitive Beverly when he tires of them. However, when Beverly falls in love for the first time with a patient, the affair drives the brothers apart - and both men begin to lose their grip on their sanity. David Cronenberg's psychological thriller, with Jeremy Irons in a dual role alongside Genevieve Bujold

programme.title: Wakefield (2016)
programme.desc: A successful suburban family man apparently vanishes one day, and proceeds to secretly observe his wife and children from their garage attic. Drama, starring Bryan Cranston, Jennifer Garner and Beverly D'Angelo

programme.title: Manganinnie (1980)
programme.desc: An Australian Aboriginal woman goes in search of her lost tribe, accompanied on her journey by a lost white girl. with whom she forms a close bond despite having no common language. As their journey towards the coast continues, the woman begins to suspect her people and culture may have been all but wiped out by British colonists. Historical drama, starring Mawuyul Yanthalawuy and Anna Ralph

programme.title: Malachi's Cove (1973)
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl in a 19th-century Cornish village is left to fend for herself after her parents die. She finds a way to support herself and her wheelchair-bound grandfather by gathering seaweed along the coast and selling it. Family drama, starring Donald Pleasence, Veronica Quilligan, Peter Vaughan and Arthur English

programme.title: Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: The house is rocked by controversy when the publication of a scandalous novel exposes Blanche's unconventional lifestyle, bringing the doctor face to face with the author of the book and her former lover Lady Portia Alresford. But when the passion between the pair reignites, the doctor becomes conflicted. Meanwhile, Persie reveals a shocking secret to Hallam, and Beryl's workload prompts her to take a stand - until a familiar old face appears to offer a few wise words. Emilia Fox guest stars, with Alex Kingston, Jean Marsh, Ed Stoppard and Claire Foy

programme.title: Burning an Illusion (1981)
programme.desc: A black woman living in West London hopes to marry her boyfriend, but finds her life thrown into upheaval when he loses his job and is subsequently arrested after getting into a fight. The experience makes her reassess her priorities, and she decides to reconnect with her African heritage. Drama, starring Cassie McFarlane and Victor Romero Evans

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams
